title: Shared-store rate limiter with atomic fairness

difficulty.rationale: Requires atomic check-and-increment on a shared counter, correct window rollover without double refill, fairness across clients, and ignoring client clock skew.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: GET /resource returns 200 with X-RateLimit-* headers under the limit.
Exceeding 10 requests per window returns 429 with Retry-After.
Different client ids have independent counters.
must_not: Admit more than 10 requests per client per window.
Let two concurrent last-slot requests both succeed.
Grant extra budget based on client clock headers.
edge_cases: After window elapse the client receives a fresh budget of 10.
X-RateLimit-Remaining decrements 9 down to 0 across ten allowed hits.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
